text.title: E2E Framework Migration Playbook Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals from inputs to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml for e2e-framework-migration-playbook.

decision-tree.root-question: Is the migration scope >=5 modules AND duration 6 weeks to 6 months AND target framework stable (>=1.0)?

conclusion.verdict: SKIP — sprint-scale refactor, not a wave migration
BLOCK — time-box Wave 2; go/no-go gate triggered
BLOCK — close parity gap before cutover
BLOCK — document and drill rollback first
skip — preconditions in Applies-If not met

text.example: 180 tests + 12 weeks + Playwright stable → first two branches do not match → wave 2 within time-box → parity passing → rollback drilled → decommission scheduled → all_gates_green=true → APPROVE.
